since_last: 40% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.87%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +0.45% · Gold +0.30% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 40% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.87%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.87%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BIDU is the standout at -4.74%
cards.body: Leaders: EQIX +2.43%, ADBE +2.28%, ADBE +2.28%, AVAV +2.06%, NOW +1.94%. Laggards: BIDU -4.74%, DELL -4.02%, AMBA -3.78%, MU -3.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.90% at $156.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.90% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
